title: DevelopmentResult
description: Result of a development execution phase. Covers both normal and continuation submissions. For continuations, include the optional continuation object.

status.description: Outcome of the development phase. Values: completed (all work done), partial (some work remains), failed (could not proceed).

summary.description: Summary of what was accomplished during this development session. May contain markdown.

files_changed.description: Optional list of files that were created, modified, or deleted. May contain markdown. Omit if no files were changed.

next_steps.description: Optional description of what should be done next. Required for continuation submissions. May contain markdown. Omit if status is completed and no follow-up is needed.

skills_mcp.description: Optional skill and MCP server recommendations for subsequent phases. Omit if none are needed.

skills.description: Skill names recommended for subsequent phases (e.g. 'frontend-angular', 'test-driven-development').

mcps.description: MCP server names recommended for subsequent phases (e.g. 'context7', 'angular-mcp').

continuation.description: Present only for continuation submissions. Signals this is a follow-up to a prior development session.

prior_session_id.description: Identifier of the prior development session being continued.
